rationale: Turn 1 clearly wakes up to the repeated local-repair spiral, refuses the requested page-level patch, names the recurrence mechanism, and redirects to a single upstream authority. Turn 2 keeps the brake active under time pressure and does not provide the requested chart-field copy, placement, checklist, command sequence, or implementation step. Because it does not make an emergency concession, the one-time/no-baseline-lift/deadline contract is not triggered; no fail signal is observed.
